nasb.text: All the officials, the mighty men, and also all the sons of King David pledged allegiance to King Solomon.

esv.text: All the leaders and the mighty men, and also all the sons of King David, pledged their allegiance to King Solomon.

cnv.text: 眾領袖和勇士，以及大衛王的眾子，都順服所羅門王。

ccb.text: 众首领、勇士以及大卫王的众子都效忠于他。
